ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transport_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transport company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the transport company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the transport company is based */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the application */,
  "approval_number" TEXT /* Unique approval number assigned by the agency */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of transport service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_companies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types_of_transport ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_companies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transport company applying */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the final decision was made */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who made the decision */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES transport_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes made by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., administrator, inspector) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application related to the decision */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the decision */,
  "decision_maker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision maker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_histories_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types_of_transport" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport type */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of required documents for the transport type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next status in the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transport company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES transport_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., approval, rejection, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., submitted, approved) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
